overall.description: A static nighttime scene in a desert environment featuring a lone robed figure sitting by a campfire next to a canvas tent, with distant mountains silhouetted against a starry sky. The footage appears to be from a stylized video game with cinematic lighting dominated by the warm glow of the fire illuminating the sandy terrain.

segments.scene_description: A completely static shot of a desert campsite at night. A lone robed figure sits motionless beside a flickering campfire, with a canvas tent pitched to the right. The fire illuminates the surrounding sand dunes while distant mountains form a dark silhouette against the starry sky. The only movement is the rising smoke and dancing flames of the fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a desert campsite under a vast nocturnal sky. It begins with a focused view of a lone robed figure sitting motionless beside a flickering campfire, where the warm light casts dancing shadows across the surrounding sand dunes. As the flames pulse, the glow illuminates a nearby canvas tent pitched to the right, contrasting with the deep shadows of the environment. The scene remains still, allowing the rising smoke to drift upward before the eye settles on the distant mountains silhouetted against a dense field of stars.
